NOTES: most specific first — both sun and load
load only — battery must not be low
load present but battery low and no sun — go safe immediately
safety first — no sun and battery low
full but load still present — stop charging and feed from battery
FIXED: was missing — battery low under load is the critical case, must shed
battery low but no load — just go idle, nothing to shed

GUARD: V_bat > SAFE_RECOVER_MV AND has_sun AND has_load AND !bat_full

NOTES: FIXED: removed '!has_load → IDLE' to prevent oscillation after load shedding. Recovery requires V_bat > SAFE_RECOVER_MV (3200mV). Loads stay shed until battery recovers.
